summary: Added automatic git worktree prune before jj workspace add in ensureWorkspace(). If add still fails with already registered, force-clears the stale git worktree registration and retries. Also refactored cleanupWorkspace() to use the new runGit dep for testability.
approach: Added optional runGit dep to RepoManagerDeps. ensureWorkspace now: (1) prunes stale git worktree registrations before jj workspace add, (2) on already registered failure, force-adds then removes a git worktree to clear the stale registration, then retries jj workspace add. cleanupWorkspace refactored to use runGit dep instead of direct Bun.spawnSync.
